_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: As MPNST typically acquire CDKN2A mutations transplanted S462 cells demonstrated loss of p16 as well...absence of p16 expression
details: Demonstrated loss of p16 expression in transplanted S462 cells, consistent with CDKN2A mutations
